nodes.label: Presidential Advisor: “I Directly Handled UFO Material” (Ft. Harald Malmgren)
nodes.summary:
Join us for a special episode with former presidential advisor Harald Malmgren.

A 27 year old Harald Malmgren literally saved the world from nuclear catastrophe during The Cuban Missile Crisis...
